nasb.text: And every day, in the temple and from house to house, they kept right on teaching and preaching Jesus as the Christ.

esv.text: And every day, in the temple and from house to house, they did not cease teaching and preaching that the Christ is Jesus.

cnv.text: 他們天天在殿裡並在各人的家中，不斷地教導，傳講耶穌是基督。

ccb.text: 他们每天在圣殿里及各家各户教导人，传扬耶稣是基督。

csbs.text: 他们每天在圣殿和各家各户不住地教导人，传福音说耶稣是基督。
